itinerary.title: Seoul Highlights Family Tour
itinerary.overview:
Gyeongbokgung Palace • N Seoul Tower • Myeongdong Shopping • Lotte World Adventure 05 Nights / 06 Days Classic Seoul Family Expedition SERIAL CODE: KR-001 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SEO-FAM-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: South Korea CATEGORY: Premium Seoul Family Tour Package DURATION: 05 Nights / 06 Days Seoul Highlights

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the vibrant capital of South Korea with our TRAGUIN curated family expedition. From the historic Gyeongbokgung Palace and iconic N Seoul Tower to the high-energy entertainment of Lotte World and the shopping delights of Myeongdong, this journey ensures your family creates unforgettable memories in the heart of Seoul. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: KR-001 | Seoul Highlights Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days South Korea package (KR-001 / TRG-SEO-FAM-2026): Gyeongbokgung Palace • N Seoul Tower • Myeongdong Shopping • Lotte World with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN SEOUL
days.description: Arrive in Seoul. Private transfer to your handpicked premium hotel. Evening at leisure to experience the city's modern neon charm.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HISTORIC PALACE TOUR
days.description: Visit the majestic Gyeongbokgung Palace. Witness the Changing of the Royal Guard and explore Bukchon Hanok Village—a must-see cultural highlight.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: SEOUL SKYLINE & SHOPPING
days.description: Take the cable car to N Seoul Tower for panoramic views. Spend the afternoon exploring the vibrant shopping streets of Myeongdong—unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LOTTE WORLD ADVENTURE
days.description: A full day of excitement at Lotte World, one of the world's largest indoor theme parks—a perfect family adventure experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: CULTURAL EXPLORATION & LEISURE
days.description: A relaxed day exploring local culture, museums, or visiting the traditional markets, enjoying the dynamic metropolis at your own pace.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Seoul highlights expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
